title: TAS outputs v2
description: Computed/measured results of running the topology against the inputs. Two sections: design (cross-cutting metrics that apply to the whole converter) and operatingPoints[] (per-condition losses, stresses, KPIs). All values in SI units.

design.description: Cross-cutting metrics that describe the whole converter, not any single operating point. Single source of truth for cost/volume/mass/footprint — these used to be duplicated across every operating point in v1.

operatingPoints.description: Per-condition results. Each entry corresponds (by name) to an inputs.operatingPoints[] entry.

origin.description: How these results were obtained. Project lesson: analytical is the trusted number; ngspice is 2-5% optimistic. Tag the origin so reviewers can compare.

methodUsed.description: Free-form tool/method label (e.g. 'ngspice', 'analytical loss budget', 'PyOpenMagnetics core loss', 'lab bench').

kpis.description: Headline metrics for this operating point.

outputVoltage.description: Actual Vout at this operating point, V. May differ slightly from inputs.outputVoltage.nominal due to regulation accuracy, cross-regulation, or load-dependent drop.

switchingFrequency.description: Actual fsw at this operating point in Hz. For fixed-frequency designs this echoes inputs.switchingFrequency.nominal in every entry. For variable-frequency designs (LLC, COT, hysteretic, BCM/QR) this varies entry-to-entry as the control law responds to (Vin, Iout, Tamb). Optional but recommended — useful for design review and EMC checks.

operatingMode.description: Actual inductor/transformer operating mode at this OP. For designs that intentionally cross the boundary (CCM at full load, DCM at light load), this varies entry-to-entry. For mode-pinned designs it echoes inputs.operatingMode in every entry. Optional but recommended.

losses.description: Loss breakdown in Watts. Per-component, indexed by refdes (matches topology.components[].name). Free-form mechanism keys per component so new mechanisms (e.g. 'driver_quiescent', 'pcb_trace') do not require schema migrations.

byComponent.description: { refdes : { mechanism : watts, ... }, ... }   e.g. { Q1: {conduction: 1.23, switching: 0.45, coss: 0.08}, L1: {core: 0.12, winding: 0.34}, Cout: {esr: 0.05} }

total.description: Sum across all components, W. Should equal sum of byComponent values; agents writing this should ensure consistency.

byComponent.description: { refdes : { quantity : value, ... }, ... }  Free-form quantity keys; SI units. Conventional keys: voltageMax (V), voltageMargin (fraction), currentPeak (A), currentRms (A), saturationMargin (fraction), Tj (°C), thermalMargin (°C). e.g. { Q1: {voltageMax: 510, voltageMargin: 0.15, Tj: 95, thermalMargin: 55}, L1: {currentPeak: 8.4, saturationMargin: 0.18} }
